Side-by-Side Comparison

FN3 Agency vs. Hiring an AI Developer

Both get you AI in your business. The cost, speed, and risk profile are very different. Here’s the honest comparison.

Hiring an AI Developer
$90K–$150K
per year in salary alone
+ 3–6 months to hire + benefits + equity
FN3 Agency
$2K–$5K
one-time setup + $500–$1,500/month
Live in 5 days. All 6 departments covered.
CategoryFN3 AgencyHiring an AI Developer
Upfront cost
$2,000 – $5,000 setup fee
$0 upfront, but 3–6 month recruiting process
Ongoing cost
$500 – $1,500 / month
$90,000 – $150,000 / year salary + benefits + equity
Time to first results
Live in 5 business days
3–6 months to hire, then ramp-up time
Departments covered
All 6: Sales, Marketing, Support, Operations, Finance, Legal
One specialist — deep in one area only
Maintenance & updates
Included. We maintain, retrain, and update agents continuously.
On you — or hire again when technology changes
Ongoing optimization
Monthly strategy calls. Weekly on Growth+. Agents tuned every sprint.
Depends entirely on the individual hire
Support model
Dedicated team with founder-level accountability
Single point of failure — what if they leave?
Integration breadth
30+ integrations covered on Growth plan and above
Skilled in whatever stack they know
Risk
Month-to-month. No lock-in. Full handover if you cancel.
Severance, IP disputes, knowledge locked in one person
Scale
Upgrade plan to add agents across any department in days
Hire another developer — start the 6-month process again

When does it make sense to hire an AI developer?

If you need deeply custom AI infrastructure, are building an AI-native product, or have engineering resources to support and scale AI systems internally — hiring may be right for you.

If you run a business that needs AI automation across multiple functions, wants results in days not months, and doesn’t want to manage technical infrastructure — FN3 is built for you.

Ready to see what’s possible for your business?

Apply for Your AI Workforce
